name: Lafutidine
description: Lafutidine has been investigated in Peptic Ulcer, Community-acquired Pneumonia, and Gastroesophageal Reflux Disease (GERD).

interactions.name: Benzylpenicilloyl Polylysine
interactions.description: Lafutidine may decrease effectiveness of Benzylpenicilloyl Polylysine as a diagnostic agent.

interactions.name: Hyaluronidase
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Hyaluronidase can be decreased when used in combination with Lafutidine.

interactions.name: Betahistine
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Betahistine can be decreased when used in combination with Lafutidine.

interactions.name: Pseudoephedrine
interactions.description: Pseudoephedrine may decrease the sedative activities of Lafutidine.

interactions.name: Diethylpropion
interactions.description: Diethylpropion may decrease the sedative activities of Lafutidine.

interactions.name: Lisdexamfetamine
interactions.description: Lisdexamfetamine may decrease the sedative activities of Lafutidine.

interactions.name: Dextroamphetamine
interactions.description: Dextroamphetamine may decrease the sedative activities of Lafutidine.

interactions.name: Phentermine
